# Euro Heaven — Mercedes-Benz Specialist Workshop

Euro Heaven is a Mercedes-Benz specialist workshop in Dandenong, Victoria,
Australia, serving Greater Melbourne. Factory-trained technicians service
and repair every Benz model — A-Class through S-Class, AMG, EQ Electric,
Sprinter and Vito vans, and classic Mercedes — using genuine Mercedes
parts, factory-approved fluids, and dealership-grade Xentry diagnostics.
All workmanship is warranty-safe.

Workshop address: 27 Podmore Street, Dandenong VIC 3175, Australia
Phone: 0400 115 765
Email: info@euroheaven.com.au
Hours: Mon–Fri 7:30am–5:30pm, Sat 8:00am–1:00pm, Sun closed
ABN: 20 657 028 585

## Services

- /services/logbook-service — Mercedes-Benz logbook service to manufacturer specification, genuine parts, authorised Digital Service Book (DSB) entries
- /services/brake-repair — Mercedes brake repair using factory-spec pads and rotors
- /services/transmission-repair — 7G-Tronic and 9G-Tronic transmission service and repair
- /services/diagnostics — Factory Xentry / DAS diagnostics for fault-code analysis on all MB models
- /services/air-conditioning — Climate control regas, leak detection, compressor and condenser repair
- /services/pre-purchase-inspection — 80-point pre-purchase inspection for used Mercedes buyers

## Models serviced

A-Class, B-Class, C-Class, CLA, E-Class, S-Class, GLA, GLB, GLC, GLE, GLS,
G-Wagen, AMG performance variants (C63, E63, GT, etc.), EQ Electric range
(EQA, EQB, EQC, EQE, EQS), Sprinter and Vito vans, classic SL / SLK /
W123 / W124 / W126 / R107.

## Service areas (Greater Melbourne)

Dandenong, Richmond, South Yarra, Toorak, Hawthorn, Kew, Camberwell,
Brighton, Malvern, Glen Iris, Caulfield, Armadale, Prahran. Also accepting
booking from anywhere in Victoria — collection / drop-off available on
request.

## Key pages

- / — Home: services overview, recent reviews, booking CTA
- /book — Online booking wizard, ~60 seconds, SMS + email confirmation
- /track — Customer repair tracking with live stage updates
- /services — Catalogue of all six service categories
- /models — Mercedes models we service
- /about — Workshop story, technician experience, certifications
- /contact — Phone / email / address / opening hours
- /reviews — Real customer reviews

## Blog

- /blog/when-to-service-your-c-class — Mercedes C-Class service interval guide
- /blog/common-w205-issues — Common faults on the W205 (2014–2021) C-Class
- /blog/warranty-independent-service — Whether independent servicing voids your Mercedes factory warranty

## Authority signals

- Factory-trained Mercedes-Benz technicians
- Genuine Mercedes parts and Mercedes-approved fluids
- Dealership-grade Xentry / DAS diagnostic equipment
- Authorised DSB (Digital Service Book) entries — your service history is recorded in the official Mercedes system
- All workmanship warranty-safe under Australian Consumer Law
- Workshop located in Dandenong, ~30 minutes from Melbourne CBD

## Booking & contact

To book: https://euroheaven.com.au/book (60-second online wizard with SMS confirmation)
To track an existing repair: https://euroheaven.com.au/track
To call: +61 400 115 765
